title: Minty Flaky American Salmon Stew
description: A fragrant, herbaceous stew that turns tender salmon into a flaky, melt‑in‑your‑mouth delight, perfect for a quick, gluten‑free dinner.
instructions: Heat the Instant Pot on the sauté setting and add olive oil.
Sauté onion, garlic, carrot, and celery until the vegetables soften, about 3‑4 minutes.
Add the white wine, deglaze the pot, and let it reduce for 2 minutes.
Pour in the stock and stir. Add the bay leaf, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Seal the lid and set to pressure cook on high for 5 minutes.
Quick release the pressure, then add the salmon cubes and fresh mint. Taste and adjust seasoning. Cook on sauté for 3 minutes, or until the salmon flakes easily.
Serve hot, garnished with extra mint if desired. Enjoy a comforting, herb‑infused American salmon stew.
